description: The dogfood root pins to-execution at a range that cannot resolve the dogfooded version, so npx silently runs a stale CLI missing the newer verbs. Bump the range so npx resolves the shipped version the root claims to dogfood.
title: Bump the dogfood root's to-execution range to the dogfooded version
acceptance_criteria: Root package.json to-execution range resolves the current src/package.json version
npx to-execution uuid succeeds from the dogfood root (no longer 'unknown command: uuid')
